theme_notes: Touchstones: US-Iran war ceasefire declared 'on massive life support' on day 73 as peace talks collapse; Trump and Xi meeting in Beijing Thursday covering trade, Taiwan, and AI; gas prices surging to $4.52/gallon from the war; UK Reform Party seizing 1,450 councils while Labour hemorrhages seats; Met Gala 2026 starring Beyoncé and Sabrina Carpenter; PSG vs Arsenal Champions League final (Budapest, May 30).
settled: Balanced. Like a Trump-Xi handshake. Photograph it before things change.
Zero owed. Cleaner than Labour's council results. Not a high bar.
All square. Even the Met Gala red carpet had more tension than this.
youOwe: Under fifty bucks. The Iran war caused worse crises than you. So far.
Less than Sabrina Carpenter's Met Gala dry-cleaning bill. Barely.
Pocket change. The Beijing summit costs more per second in security.
Gas went from $2.98 to $4.52. Your debt growth rate is comparable.
Low hundreds. Trump called it 'massive life support.' Your finances: same.
Reform UK won 1,450 councils on this kind of momentum. You owe it to someone.
Mid-hundreds. The Strait of Hormuz has been closed for less friction than this.
That's two months of gas hikes condensed into one person's tab.
PSG vs Arsenal tickets cost less. Arsenal fans in Budapest have better prospects.
Approaching a grand. Xi and Trump have less awkward agenda items than you.
High hundreds. Reform UK swept on less dramatic energy than your avoidance.
Getting close to four figures. The ceasefire has better odds than your payment timeline.
Four figures. Gas hit $4.52 a gallon; somehow you're the bigger economic shock.
The Beijing summit covered trade, AI, and Taiwan. Your debt is also tabled there.
More than a Met Gala dress. Less than a Met Gala table. Depressing gap.
Five grand. The ceasefire is on massive life support. So is your credibility.
At this level you're a geopolitical event. Xi's team has been briefed.
More than five thousand. That's not a tab. That's a sanctions package waiting to happen.
theyOwe: They owe you less than a tank of gas at current prices. Start somewhere.
Forty-odd dollars. Smaller than the Iran ceasefire gap. Only slightly.
Pocket change in your favor. The Met Gala napkins cost more than this.
A hundred bucks. Every world leader flying to watch Trump and Xi has more than this.
Low hundreds. Reform UK took the councils with exactly this energy.
Call it 'on massive life support' and see if they move faster.
Mid-range, in your favor. World leaders are 'monitoring with concern.'
Enough for a tank and a half at current war prices. Morally significant.
The Beijing summit excluded more from the agenda than this. You're a priority.
Almost a grand owed to you. More patience than the US-Iran peace talks.
High hundreds. Starmer lost seats over smaller credibility gaps than this.
Getting close to four figures. PSG sold a midfielder to cover theirs. Learn.
Four figures. You are now a creditor nation. File your trade demands.
That's three months of gas hikes concentrated into one person's casual debt.
The Met Gala table costs more. But this is your table. It matters.
Over five thousand. The Beijing summit agenda is less overdue than this.
Enough for Trump to call it 'totally unacceptable' on your behalf.
They owe you a number that makes the Iran war look like a billing dispute.
